full_text:
Linghu Shao (Kongshu) 令狐邵 (孔叔)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Linghu Shao (令狐邵), styledKongshu (孔叔), was born in Taiyuan. A man of family, he was noted for good and honest government, hating lawsuits and being friendly to his officers. Linghu Shao was affiliated with Yuan Shao and the Wei Kingdom. Linghu Shao lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
